shots.prompt_intent: dawn over a rocky cape, a white lighthouse silhouette, gentle swell, archival film grade, muted maritime palette
shots.narration: In 1716 the first American lighthouse rose.

shots.prompt_intent: the camera drifts inward toward a rotating Fresnel lens glowing amber
shots.narration: Its lens threw a beam for twenty miles.

shots.prompt_intent: the beam sweeps out across a calm sea at dusk in light fog
shots.narration: Today they stand automated and quiet.

music.tags: ambient, reflective, cinematic, soft piano, instrumental
